# Production Release PR

## Summary

Briefly describe the release scope and the main user-facing or operational changes.

## Release Notes

- List the key features, fixes, or infra changes included in this promotion.

## Validation

- Describe the checks completed before opening this PR.
- Include deployment or smoke-test notes when relevant.

## Risks / Rollback

- Call out any release risks, migration concerns, or rollback steps.
